title: Interaksi di Jeda Perjalanan
theme: Menemukan keindahan koneksi manusia yang tak terduga dalam rutinitas perjalanan sehari-hari, meskipun hanya sebatas pandangan mata dan senyum tipis.

cover.prompt: Interior of a city bus during golden hour. Gentle, warm sunlight streams through the windows, creating a soft glow. In the foreground, a canvas messenger bag rests on a seat, subtly out of focus. A quiet silhouette of a person in the middle ground holds an open book or a slim tablet, illuminated by the beautiful morning light. Blurred glimpses of a vibrant cityscape are visible through the bus windows, suggesting movement. Composition uses rule of thirds, with a shallow depth of field to emphasize the atmosphere.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A subtle romance between two strangers, Maya and Bayu, who regularly take the same bus. An accidental encounter breaks their comfortable silence, leading to a brief but meaningful conversation and a growing unspoken connection, transforming their daily commute into a journey of anticipation and hope.
meta.target_emotion: Hope, warmth, gentle anticipation, subtle joy of connection
